name: AWS IAM Role Over Privileged Trust Policy Created
description: Detected the creation of an excessively permissive trust policy for a role, which might indicate the installation of a backdoor by an attacker to assume that role from any external aws account later and potentially compromise the target aws account further.

filterSets.name: AWS IAM Role Over Privileged Trust Policy Created

author: David Agni & Yash Verma
